name: Kothimeera Pachadi
steps: Fry urad dal and green chillies in a little oil until the dal turns golden.
Add the coriander leaves and saute just until they wilt.
Grind with tamarind and salt into a bright green, thick pachadi.
Crackle mustard seeds, red chillies and curry leaves in oil.
Pour the tempering on top and serve with rice, dosa or upma.
